emphasis: where the product list comes from (PostgreSQL product_raw_{version})
review pagination logic and per-product scraping flow
concurrency model (asyncio semaphore limits, batch sizes)
rate-limiting / anti-bot handling (sleeps, retries, UA, proxies if any)
output pipeline (Parquet via PyArrow, batches of 500, _manifest.json contract per run)
shared infra with sibling scrapers (RDS connection, S3 bucket)
schema-evidence pairs the validator can resolve to file:line

pages.purpose: Project-scoped agent-docs entry for the review-scrapper-async repo (note: repo dir has typo `scrapper`; slug is clean `review-scraper`). Frontmatter-only, conformant to docs/AGENT_DOCS_SCHEMA.md v0.2.

references.note: Third K-Beauty scraper, sibling to oliveyoung-scraper and bkurly-scraper. Calibrate shape against those (especially bkurly-scraper, a near-twin). Cross-link via related[]: oliveyoung-scraper + bkurly-scraper as upstream siblings (all three scrapers); product-db-pipeline as the project that produces the product_raw input list this scraper reads from; sentiment-analysis as the downstream consumer of the Parquet output. Note the slug intentionally normalizes the repo's typo `scrapper` to clean `scraper`.
